headline: Texas Instruments board declares second quarter 2026 quarterly dividend
summary: The board of directors of Texas Instruments Incorporated (Nasdaq: TXN) today declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.42 per share of common stock, payable May 19, 2026, to stockholders of record on May 5, 2026.
